response.overview: Josette, Babette, and Boubouch, pioneers of women’s soccer at the Chaffoteaux factory, meet the young professional players who now play for their club in Guingamp. The young players share their experiences, while the veterans recall their own: the same resistance, the same passion, and the feeling of always having to start the fight over again. A clear bond forms. As a match approaches, the stakes go beyond the score: on the field, it is the same joy of playing and the same struggle that continues, together.
response.title: champions
